div1.entryFree:
Untie, to unbind, to unfasten, to loosen: u. my hands, Shr. II, 21. too hard a knot for me to u. Tw. II, 2, 42. the amity that wisdom knits not, folly may easily u. Troil. II, 3, 111. though you u. the winds, Mcb. IV, 1, 52. this knot of life at once u. Ant. V, 2, 308.
== to solve (a riddle); a speaking such as sense cannot u. Cymb. V, 4, 149. == to break (a charm): u. the spell, Tp. V, 253.
